name: code
description: code — coding-workflow plugin. Sub-skills for the manager/router engineering loop: `code:loop` drains a queue end-to-end (single ticket or many) with mindset-grounded autonomy, `code:dispatch` triages a single task and picks the delivery path, `code:review` runs a sub-agent pre-merge review with file:line grounding and a security pass on risk-touching diffs, `code:verify` runs the end-to-end gate, `code:sprint` runs a time-boxed multi-track parallel push, `code:quality` runs a read-only health diagnostic and opens an HTML report. `/commit` splits the working tree into the maximum number of small logical commits.
